name: winccoa-ui-panel-viewer
description: Read-only viewer for WinCC OA .pnl panel files with structure tree, properties, scripts, and preview launcher.
author: winccoa-tools-pack

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_listLoadedPanels
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List WinCC OA panels currently loaded into the Panel Viewer tree.
languageModelTools.userDescription: List WinCC OA panels currently loaded into the Panel Viewer tree.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_getPanelModel
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the parsed structure/properties/scripts of a loaded WinCC OA panel as JSON.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get the parsed structure/properties/scripts of a loaded WinCC OA panel as JSON.

filePath.description: Absolute file system path of the panel (.pnl) to retrieve. If omitted, uses the currently opened panel (or the only loaded panel).

includeScripts.description: Whether to include script bodies in the response.

maxScriptChars.description: Maximum number of characters per script body (truncates longer scripts).

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_openPanelInViewer
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Open a WinCC OA panel (.pnl) or XML (.xml, converted to .pnl first) in the WinCC OA UI viewer.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Open a WinCC OA .pnl or .xml file in the WinCC OA UI viewer.

filePath.description: Absolute path to a .pnl or .xml panel file to open in the UI viewer.

uiArgs.description: Optional extra command-line arguments to pass to WCCOAui.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_convertPnlToXml
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Convert a single WinCC OA panel .pnl file to XML on disk.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Convert a single WinCC OA panel .pnl file to XML on disk.

filePath.description: Absolute path to a .pnl file to convert to XML.

outputDir.description: Optional output directory for the XML file; defaults to the same directory as the input panel.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_convertXmlToPnl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Convert a single WinCC OA XML panel (.xml) back to .pnl on disk.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Convert a single WinCC OA XML panel (.xml) back to .pnl on disk.

filePath.description: Absolute path to a .xml panel file to convert back to .pnl.

outputDir.description: Optional output directory for the .pnl file; defaults to the same directory as the input XML.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_convertDirPnlToXml
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Recursively convert all WinCC OA .pnl files in a directory tree to XML on disk.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Recursively convert all WinCC OA .pnl files in a directory tree to XML on disk.

dirPath.description: Absolute path to a directory containing .pnl files to convert recursively.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_convertDirXmlToPnl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Recursively convert all WinCC OA XML panel files (.xml) in a directory tree back to .pnl on disk.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Recursively convert all WinCC OA XML panel files (.xml) in a directory tree back to .pnl on disk.

dirPath.description: Absolute path to a directory containing .xml panel files to convert recursively.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_summarizePanel
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return a short natural-language style summary and basic statistics for a loaded WinCC OA panel (shapes, scripts, errors).
languageModelTools.userDescription: Return a short natural-language style summary and basic statistics for a loaded WinCC OA panel (shapes, scripts, errors).

filePath.description: Absolute path to the panel (.pnl) to summarize. If omitted, uses the currently opened panel or the only loaded panel.

languageModelTools.name: winccoaPanelViewer_checkPanelSyntax
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run WCCOAui with -syntax for a panel and summarize WARNING/SEVERE/FATAL messages from logs/stderr.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run WCCOAui with -syntax for a panel and summarize WARNING/SEVERE/FATAL messages from logs/stderr.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the panel (.pnl) to check. If omitted, uses the currently opened panel or the only loaded panel.

severities.description: Optional list of severity keywords to treat as issues (default: WARNING, SEVERE, FATAL).

timeoutMs.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the WCCOAui -syntax process (default: 60000).

maxLogChars.description: Maximum number of characters to return from stderr/stdout snippets (default: 8000).

commands.title: WinCC OA: Open Panel in Viewer
WinCC OA: Load All Panels from Project
WinCC OA: Dump Language Model Tools

WinCC OA: Invoke LM Tool (Get Panel Model)

viewsWelcome.contents:
No panel loaded.
[Open Panel](command:winccoaPanelViewer.openPanel)
[Load All Panels from Project](command:winccoaPanelViewer.loadAllPanels)
Or right-click a .pnl file in Explorer → 'WinCC OA: Open Panel'
Select a property or script in the tree to see details.

scripts.clean:out-tests: node -e "try{require('fs').rmSync('out/test',{ recursive:true, force:true, maxRetries:10, retryDelay:200 })}catch(e){console.warn('clean:out-tests skipped:', e.message)}"
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run compile:tsc && npm run lint
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run compile:tsc && npm run clean:coverage:unitTests && vscode-test --label unitTests --coverage --coverage-output coverage/unitTests --coverage-reporter lcov --coverage-reporter html --coverage-reporter json-summary --coverage-reporter text-summary
scripts.test:integration:coverage: npm run compile:tsc && npm run clean:coverage:integrationTests && vscode-test --label integrationTests --coverage --coverage-output coverage/integrationTests --coverage-reporter lcov --coverage-reporter html --coverage-reporter json-summary --coverage-reporter text-summary
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run test:integration:coverage
scripts.ci:integration: npm ci && npm run compile && npm run test:integration
scripts.style-check: npm run format:check && npm run lint
